subcodes.title: Words to the Baha'is, spoken on 1912-11-06
subcodes.first_line: Baha'u'llah, without earthly power and worldly means, laid the foundations for eternal glory and promoted divine teachings.
subcodes.first_line_orig: حضرت بهآءالله بدون قواء ملکیه و شئون ظاهره تاسیس عزت ابدیه و ترویج تعالیم الهیه نمود
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @unity in diversity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
